rationale: Review 2 identifies a genuine internal inconsistency confirmed in the diff: the module title claims 'elementary abelian' while the body explicitly defers the (ℤ/2)ⁿ identification to a later step, calling what is actually proved 'exponent-two and abelian.' For a formalization project, a title that overclaims relative to its own body text is a real documentation defect a maintainer would want corrected. Review 1 misses this.
